summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of TEN MediaHQ rota creation flow. Backend APIs are fully functional, but frontend has integration issues preventing data display.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 status code instead of 201 for resource creation

integration_issues.issue: Services are not displayed despite API returning data correctly
User assignments not displayed despite API returning correct data
Checklist items not displayed despite API having 29 items

success_percentage.frontend: 30% - UI loads but data integration failing

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Frontend-backend integration is broken. The backend APIs work perfectly and return correct data, but the frontend React components are not displaying the data. Issues: 1) Assign Rotas page shows 'Select a service to create a rota' but no services appear despite API having services, 2) My Rotas page is empty despite user having assignments, 3) Service Checklists page doesn't show the 29 checklist items. This appears to be an authentication issue with frontend API calls or incorrect API endpoint usage in React components. Check: credentials: 'include' in fetch calls, correct REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL usage, and error handling in useEffect hooks.
